header: Resource Library that feels ready to ship

items.title: What makes this pattern production-ready?
items.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.

items.title: How does it stay theme-aware?
items.description: A sharp, production-minded resource library using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so content teams can publish clearer stories with reusable blocks.

items.title: What should editors check first?
items.description: Built to show the resource library with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

items.title: How does it behave on mobile?
items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this resource library easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.
